Valhalla The Score [Limited Edition] / Valhalla The Score [Limited Edition] / Valhalla The Score [Limited Edition]

Valhalla The Score
Valhalla The Score
Catalog Number PS 180615
Barcode 9780201379624
Release Date Aug 26, 2019
Publish Format Commercial, Limited Edition
Release Price 16.99 EUR
Media Format CD
Classification Original Soundtrack, Prototype/Unused
OrganizationsPlantSounds Records

Credits

Composer / ComposerRon Goodwin, Bent Hesselmann, Børge Ring, Jussi Adler Olsen
Arranger / ArrangerRon Goodwin
Performer / PerformerCollegium Musicum, Canzone Choir, T. Clausen, B. Stief, K. Hovmark, L. Gauvsted, B. Roupe, K. Knudsen
Conductor / ConductorRon Goodwin

Tracklist

  • English
Disc 1

01 Introduction 2:14
02 Thor's Arrival 1:17
03 Children's Theme 0:58
04 Thor's Fishing Story 1:14
05 Morning of Magic Hammer 1:21
06 Farewell Theme 1:05
07 The Rainbow Bridge 1:58
08 At Thor's & Sif's Home 1:15
09 Loke & Quark's Arrival 0:39
10 Thor's Anger 1:07
11 The Children in the Forest 2:22
12 Building the Hut 4:50
13 Whistling Theme 0:51
14 The Giants' Theme 2:22
15 The Eating Contest 2:29
16 The Drinking Contest 0:32
17 Thor and the Cat 1:20
18 Elle's Dance 2:45
19 Tjalfe & Thor 2:11
20 Giants' Party 2:07
21 Goodbye Quark 1:16
22 Tjalfe Gets his Sword 1:44
23 Valhalla Ending 5:17
24 Valhalla Pilot (part 1) 2:21
25 Valhalla Pilot (part 2) 1:04
26 Valhalla Pilot (part 3) 2:09
27 Whistling Theme (alternate version - demo) 0:50
28 Thor's Theme (demo) 0:49
29 Loke in Thor's House (demo) 0:42
30 Giants' Theme (demo) 0:59
31 Quark's Theme (demo) 0:56
Disc length 53:04

 

Notes

Music Composed by:
Ron Goodwin, Bent Hesselmann, Jussi Adler Olsen & Børge Ring

Performed by:
Collegium Musicum & Canzone Choir

Conducted by Ron Goodwin

'Giants' Party' performed by:
T. Clausen, B. Stief, K. Hovmark, L. Gauvsted, B. Roupe & K. Knudsen

Recorded in December 1985 at Easy Sound by N. E. Lund

Original Mastering:
W. Sherrer

2019 Mastering:
Jan Eliasson - Audioplanet

Executive Producer:
Jesper Hansen

Valhalla Artwork and Logo by
Peter Madsen

Album Art Direction:
Javier Burgos

PlantSounds wishes to thank:
Hans Perk, Peter Madsen, Bent Hesselmann, Brian Iskov, Rod Howick, Jakob Stegelmann, Henrik Daldorph, Ron Shillingford & 'The Ron Goodwin Estate'

Brian Iskov wishes to thank:
Peter Madsen, Bent Hesselmann, Toke Lund Christensen, Aase Moresco, Jakob Stegelmann, Hans Perk & Phil Griffiths

---

M-01~12, 14~23, 27~31
Composed by Ron Goodwin

M-13
Composed by Børge Ring
Arranged by Ron Goodwin

M-24~26
Composed by Bent Hesselmann & Jussi Adler Olsen

---

Limited Edition of 1500 copies
